title: OID Inventory Assessment Client Readiness Pack

readiness_checks.label: Browser-only local audit can produce derived findings
Sample evidence delivery pack is represented
Source boundary excludes OID-base page-body mirroring
readiness_checks.evidence: full page-body crawl requires explicit authorization

public_artifacts.purpose: Browser dashboard and local OID list audit
Downloadable client intake request and sample CSV data
This compact review flow and acceptance pack
Scope, inputs, deliverables, and acceptance criteria
Robots, terms, sitemap, and collection boundary receipt
Artifact hashes, sizes, and publishable data boundary

review_flow.output: Client uses the intake request and sample CSV shape before sharing any OID list.
Browser or CLI classifies invalid values, public registry evidence, unknown private enterprise arcs, and unresolved valid OIDs.
Remediation CSV and Markdown board identify owner actions and acceptance checks.
Derived findings and source links are shared without raw client inventories or copied OID-base page bodies.
The same input format can be audited again to confirm the cleanup result.

acceptance_evidence: Every input row is classified as invalid, evidence-ready, or unresolved.
Invalid OID values have correction guidance.
Known private enterprise arcs include public PEN owner evidence when available.
OID-base evidence uses sitemap/source URLs only; OID-base page bodies stay out of the published package.
Unresolved valid OIDs are listed as an internal registry review queue.
Final shared artifacts contain derived findings only.
excluded_data: credentials, OTPs, cookies, tokens, and private account exports
Payment, tax, KYC, or billing material
OID-base raw Markdown, HTML, or page-body mirrors without source-owner authorization
